rationale: Compute is dominated by remote LLM API calls. CPU and RAM are used for orchestration, JSONL event logging, budget tracking, pdflatex compiles, and short-lived Codex/Claude-Code subprocess sandboxes used by configurable CLI nodes. t3.medium gives us 2 vCPU and 4 GiB RAM, which is enough for the current workflow runner image. The 23-hour timeout leaves margin for clean shutdown and final metadata writes.
